◎简　　介  

　　Brighton-based British indie filmmaker Jamie Patterson turns his genre-hopping talents to the rom-com for this brash and breezy take on the end of an affair. Chris and Lucy are cut adrift in their thirties struggling to remember what initially attracted them to one another and wondering where do they go from here.
